summary: Iteration 12 testing complete. All 19 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified: 1) Login page with OTP flow (dev mode shows OTP), 2) Login page with password flow, 3) Register page with 3-step wizard (Your Details -> Business Info -> Confirm), 4) Super admin (9948303060) routes to SaaS Admin Panel, 5) Tenant admin (8888888888) routes to Mobile Owner Dashboard, 6) New registration creates user + tenant + auto-login token.
seed_data_creation: Registration tests created multiple test users with unique phone numbers (98765xxxxx pattern). These are auto-cleaned by using unique random phones.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 12 testing complete. All auth features verified: 1) OTP login works - dev mode shows OTP in green box on screen and in API response. 2) Password login works for both super_admin (9948303060) and tenant_admin (8888888888). 3) Registration 3-step wizard works: Step 1 (name, phone, email, password), Step 2 (business name, city, 7 category buttons), Step 3 (review summary + Start Free Demo). 4) Registration auto-creates tenant with company_name and category, hashes password with bcrypt, returns JWT token for immediate login. 5) Dashboard routing: super_admin sees SaaS Admin Panel, tenant_admin sees Mobile Owner Dashboard with category-specific widgets.

backend_auth_apis.POST /api/auth/send-otp (super_admin): PASS - Returns OTP in dev mode
backend_auth_apis.POST /api/auth/send-otp (tenant_admin): PASS - Returns OTP in dev mode
backend_auth_apis.POST /api/auth/login (tenant_admin): PASS - Returns token with role=tenant_admin, tenant_id

backend_register_api.POST /api/auth/register (full data): PASS - Creates user + tenant + returns token

frontend_login_page.page_loads: PASS - /login loads with OTP flow as default
frontend_login_page.otp_flow: PASS - Enter phone -> Get OTP -> Shows dev OTP in green box -> Enter OTP -> Verify
frontend_login_page.password_flow: PASS - Switch to password -> Enter phone/email + password -> Login

frontend_register_page.step_1_your_details: PASS - Shows name, phone, email, password fields
frontend_register_page.step_2_business_info: PASS - Shows business name, city, 7 category buttons
frontend_register_page.step_3_confirm: PASS - Shows review summary + 'Start Free Demo' button
frontend_register_page.registration_success: PASS - Creates account and redirects to Mobile Owner Dashboard
frontend_register_page.auto_login: PASS - User is logged in immediately after registration

frontend_dashboard_routing.super_admin_dashboard: PASS - Shows SaaS Admin Panel with KPIs, tenants table, admin links
frontend_dashboard_routing.tenant_admin_dashboard: PASS - Shows Mobile Owner Dashboard with AI status, quick actions, category widgets

mocked_apis.sms_otp: MOCKED - Dev mode shows OTP in API response and on screen instead of sending SMS
